creator: bahlgren@beah.se
text:
www/firefox3 (firefox-3.0.5,1) does not automatically pick up plugins from
/usr/local/lib/browser_plugins (or /usr/local/lib/browser_linux_plugins)
like firefox2 does.

Fix: Drop attached patch in www/firefox3/files and rebuild.

The patch is similar to an already existing FreeBSD patch for firefox2.
(Sorry for the .txt extension - workaround to get right mime-type)

Patch attached with submission follows:
